CritConfig.description:
Raw config shape (what gets saved to disk). All fields optional -- only overrides are stored.

JSDoc comments on fields become `description` in the generated JSON Schema. Run `pnpm gen:schema` after changing this interface.

author.description: Default author name for comments. Supports {model} placeholder for dynamic model ID.

shareUrl.description: Custom share service URL. Set to empty string to disable sharing.

systemPromptGuidance.description: Inject tool guidance into the system prompt each turn.
